testsuite.name: io.slogr.agent.platform.credential.CredentialStoreTest

testcase.name: corrupt credential file returns null without throwing()
store and load round-trip preserves all credential fields()
load returns null when no credential file exists()

testsuite.system-out: 21:13:31.936 [Test worker] WARN io.slogr.agent.platform.credential.EncryptedCredentialStore -- Failed to load credential: Input data too short to contain an expected tag length of 16bytes
